spec_section.title: Diagnostic Session Timeout
spec_section.text: If no tester present message is received for 5 seconds during extended diagnostic session, the ECU shall return to default session and clear the temporary security unlock.
spec_section.normalized_text: If no tester present message is received for 5 seconds during extended diagnostic session, the ECU shall return to default session and clear the temporary security unlock.
parser_warnings: timeout value extracted from adjacent table row

note_request.title: Diagnostic timeout note
note_request.summary: Extended diagnostic session must fall back to default session after 5 seconds without tester present and revoke temporary unlock state.

requirement_request.title: Return to default diagnostic session after tester timeout
requirement_request.statement: The ECU shall return to default diagnostic session and clear the temporary security unlock if no tester present message is received for 5 seconds during extended diagnostic session.

expected.note_summary: Extended diagnostic session must fall back to default session after 5 seconds without tester present and revoke temporary unlock state.
expected.requirement_title: Return to default diagnostic session after tester timeout
